description_long: This is a medium-sized, square wooden storage box with a slightly weathered appearance, featuring visible wood grain and subtle scuff marks along the edges. The box is constructed from thick wooden planks, reinforced at the corners with a beveled frame for added durability. The surface is finished in a warm, brown hue, with lighter streaks and worn patches suggesting frequent use or exposure to the elements. The top of the box is flat and appears to be a removable or liftable lid, seamlessly integrated with the rest of the structure. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, giving the box a simple, utilitarian look. This type of box is commonly found in garages, storage rooms, or outdoor urban environments for storing tools, supplies, or miscellaneous items.
description: A weathered, square wooden storage box with a flat, removable lid and visible wood grain, finished in a warm brown color. The box is sturdy, unadorned, and designed for practical storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood grain, horizontal plank lines, and beveled frame with visible wear.
description_view_1: Side view with vertical plank lines and a slightly more uniform surface, less pronounced grain.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with horizontal plank lines and subtle scuff marks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical plank lines and a smoother, less detailed surface.
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, storage room, outdoor, stackable
